sourceFeedback.B25-07: Make this even thicker. Ensure horizontal bars match the same thickness as vertical bars.
sourceFeedback.B25-13: Rotate so the arrow points right instead of up.

variants.description: Right-turn arrow with thick equal-width bars (~22px), medium arrowhead
variants.notes: Thickened both horizontal and vertical segments to equal width. Medium-sized triangular arrowhead.

variants.description: Right-turn arrow with thick equal-width bars, large arrowhead
variants.notes: Same thick equal bars as 01, but with a significantly larger arrowhead extending further up and down.

variants.description: Right-turn arrow with thick equal-width bars, compact arrowhead
variants.notes: Same thick equal bars, compact arrowhead that's tighter and more proportional.

variants.description: Right-pointing arrow (B25-13 rotated 90 degrees clockwise), bold thick shaft
variants.notes: The original upward arrow rotated to point right. 20px shaft width, balanced proportions.

variants.description: Right-pointing arrow (B25-13 rotated 90 degrees clockwise), bolder with wider head
variants.notes: Same concept as 04 but with a wider arrowhead spread and 24px shaft. More aggressive proportions.
A medium-weight right-pointing arrow. Slightly more refined feel than 04-05.

variants.description: Right-pointing arrow, ultra-bold shaft (26px) with massive triangular head
variants.notes: Maximum boldness. 26px shaft fills most of the vertical space, arrowhead reaches near edge of squircle.

variants.description: Right-turn arrow (L-shape), ultra thick and chunky, nearly fills the squircle
variants.notes: Pushed the right-turn concept to maximum size. 26px bars, arrowhead extends to edges. Chunky, assertive feel.

variants.description: Diagonal arrow pointing upper-right, thick shaft
variants.notes: 45-degree diagonal arrow. Combines the directional energy of both sources. Bold rectangular shaft on the diagonal.
Pure directional mark. No shaft, just a thick right-pointing chevron/caret shape cut out of the squircle.
